chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 1296 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Abul Hassan Noondani, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5 to 7 which is taken on record. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with SIP / SHO Abdul Majeed Nizamani, Police Station Mirwah District Mirpurkhas. -------- This petition is based on the allegations of harassment leveled by the petitioner, against the official respondents at the behest of private respondents. Learned counsel for the private respondents No.5 to 7 present in Court submits that they are already following the legal course by way of registering F.I.Rs. No.14 and 16 of 2017, at Police Station Mirwah, and the allegation of harassment leveled against them are ill-founded. Learned A.A.G. files comments on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4 which are taken on record and also makes statement that no harassment whatsoever was ever caused to the Petitioner and further he will ensure that the official Respondents should not caused any harassment to the Petitioner. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with the observation that the respondents shall not, directly or indirectly, cause any illegal harassment to the petitioner. However, the Investigation Officer of Crime No.14 of 2017 and 16 of 2017, of Police Station Mirwah Gorchani, District Mirpurkhas, is directed to carry out impartial and honest investigation in accordance with law if challan has not been submitted. JUDGE JUDGE A.
